'''鈭歮-t-w''' ('''matawa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xmit|xmit]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-t-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xmit|xmit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-t-w
|-
! Lemma
| matawa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:matawithi|matawithi]] || [[word:matawiji|matawiji]] || [[word:matawishi|matawishi]] || [[word:matawi|matawi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:matawuthuth|matawuthuth]] || [[word:matawujuj|matawujuj]] || [[word:matawushush|matawushush]] || [[word:mataw|mataw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:matawuthu|matawuthu]] || [[word:matawuju|matawuju]] || [[word:matawushu|matawushu]] || [[word:matawu|matawu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:matawufuth|matawufuth]] || [[word:matawufuj|matawufuj]] || [[word:matawufush|matawufush]] || [[word:matawuf|matawuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:matawethe|matawethe]] || [[word:mataweje|mataweje]] || [[word:mataweshe|mataweshe]] || [[word:matawe|matawe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:matawothoth|matawothoth]] || [[word:matawojoj|matawojoj]] || [[word:matawoshosh|matawoshosh]] || [[word:mataw|mataw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:matawotho|matawotho]] || [[word:matawojo|matawojo]] || [[word:matawosho|matawosho]] || [[word:matawo|matawo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:matawofoth|matawofoth]] || [[word:matawofoj|matawofoj]] || [[word:matawofosh|matawofosh]] || [[word:matawof|matawof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mataw忙th忙|mataw忙th忙]] || [[word:mataw忙j忙|mataw忙j忙]] || [[word:mataw忙sh忙|mataw忙sh忙]] || [[word:mataw忙|mataw忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:matawathath|matawathath]] || [[word:matawajaj|matawajaj]] || [[word:matawashash|matawashash]] || [[word:mataw|mataw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:matawatha|matawatha]] || [[word:matawaja|matawaja]] || [[word:matawasha|matawasha]] || [[word:matawa|matawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:matawafath|matawafath]] || [[word:matawafaj|matawafaj]] || [[word:matawafash|matawafash]] || [[word:matawaf|matawaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:matawasha|matawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomatawasha|gomatawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimatawasha|gokimatawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:matawn眉sha|matawn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomatawnkn眉sha|gomatawnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimatawn眉sha|gokimatawn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:matawsh毛sha|matawsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomatawnksh毛sha|gomatawnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimatawsh毛sha|gokimatawsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:matawrosha|matawrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomatawnkrosha|gomatawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimatawrosha|gokimatawrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:matawmusha|matawmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomatawnkmusha|gomatawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimatawmusha|gokimatawmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:matawsherasha|matawsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomatawnksherasha|gomatawnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimatawsherasha|gokimatawsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:matawngasha|matawngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomatawnkngasha|gomatawnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimatawngasha|gokimatawngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:matawyasha|matawyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomatawnkyasha|gomatawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimatawyasha|gokimatawyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:matawyamasha|matawyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomatawnkyamasha|gomatawnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimatawyamasha|gokimatawyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:matawn眉sh毛sha|matawn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomatawnkn眉sh毛sha|gomatawnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimatawn眉sh毛sha|gokimatawn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:matawn眉rosha|matawn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomatawnkn眉rosha|gomatawnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimatawn眉rosha|gokimatawn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:matawn眉musha|matawn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomatawnkn眉musha|gomatawnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimatawn眉musha|gokimatawn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:matawsh毛n眉sha|matawsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomatawnksh毛n眉sha|gomatawnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimatawsh毛n眉sha|gokimatawsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:matawsh毛rosha|matawsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomatawnksh毛rosha|gomatawnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimatawsh毛rosha|gokimatawsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:matawsh毛musha|matawsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomatawnksh毛musha|gomatawnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimatawsh毛musha|gokimatawsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:matawron眉sha|matawron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomatawnkron眉sha|gomatawnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimatawron眉sha|gokimatawron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:matawrosh毛sha|matawrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomatawnkrosh毛sha|gomatawnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimatawrosh毛sha|gokimatawrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:matawromusha|matawromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomatawnkromusha|gomatawnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimatawromusha|gokimatawromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:matawmun眉sha|matawmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomatawnkmun眉sha|gomatawnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimatawmun眉sha|gokimatawmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:matawmush毛sha|matawmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomatawnkmush毛sha|gomatawnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimatawmush毛sha|gokimatawmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:matawmurosha|matawmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomatawnkmurosha|gomatawnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimatawmurosha|gokimatawmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:mataw|mataw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:m忙t忙w|m忙t忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homataw|homataw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hom忙t忙w|hom忙t忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomataw|hohomataw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohom忙t忙w|hohom忙t忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉mataw|n眉mataw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉m忙t忙w|n眉m忙t忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉mataw|n眉n眉mataw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉m忙t忙w|n眉n眉m忙t忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂mataw|n茂mataw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂m忙t忙w|n茂m忙t忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂mataw|n茂n茂mataw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂m忙t忙w|n茂n茂m忙t忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumataw|lumataw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lum忙t忙w|lum忙t忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumataw|lulumataw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulum忙t忙w|lulum忙t忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limataw|limataw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lim忙t忙w|lim忙t忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimataw|lilimataw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilim忙t忙w|lilim忙t忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komataw|komataw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kom忙t忙w|kom忙t忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomataw|kokomataw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokom忙t忙w|kokom忙t忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemataw|kemataw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kem忙t忙w|kem忙t忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemataw|kekemataw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekem忙t忙w|kekem忙t忙w]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
